# Zapixal

> Zapixal is a free, 100% browser-local image converter and compressor operating entirely client-side via WebAssembly and Canvas API. Zero server uploads, unlimited batch file processing, and EXIF metadata stripping.

Zapixal processes images fully offline inside browser memory to preserve maximum user privacy and zero data leakage.

## Core Features
- [HEIC to JPG](/heic-to-jpg): Convert HEIC files to JPG format locally in browser.
- [JPEG Compression](/compress-jpeg-under-200kb): Compress JPEG and PNG files under specific target file sizes (e.g., 200KB, 100KB).
- [Format Converter](/convert-png-to-webp): Convert between PNG, JPG, WEBP, AVIF, and PDF.
- [EXIF Metadata Remover](/exif-metadata-remover): Strip GPS location data and device camera info from photos.

## Optional
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full list of programmatic conversion tools and routes.
